headline: How The Align Technology (ALGN) Story Is Shifting After The Pullback And New US$200 Targets
summary: The analyst fair value estimate for Align Technology has shifted from US$198.67 to US$201.69 per share, putting the current research focus squarely on how that updated target compares with the stock’s recent pullback. With several bullish reports framing levels around US$200 as a more attractive entry point, the new fair value is close to the cluster of raised targets on the Street. Read on to consider how this evolving narrative might influence your view of Align’s risk and reward trade off...
